summary: публичное акционерное общество "Нефтяная компания "Роснефть" (LEI 253400JT3MQWNDKMJE44) is identifier-confirmed, registered in the Russian Federation. According to OpenSanctions, the entity is itself tagged as sanctioned (high confidence), and its ownership structure includes shareholders Rosneftegaz JSC, Bp Russian Investments Limited, QH Oil Investments LLC, RN-NeftKapitalInvest LLC, NKO Natsional'nyi Raschetnyi Depozitariy AO, and RAO Rosneftegazstroy, while GLEIF reports a reporting exception meaning no known person can be identified as the ultimate parent (medium confidence), constituting an opaque ownership signal. The entity holds shareholdings in an extensive portfolio of subsidiaries spanning Russia, Germany, Switzerland, the United Kingdom, India, and Qatar, with multiple related entities — including Rn-Vankor, Rosneft Deutschland GmbH, ООО "РН-Капитал", TNK Trading International S.A., and others — themselves flagged as sanctioned by OpenSanctions (high confidence); the ownership chain reaches jurisdictions outside the EU/EEA (CH, GB, IN, QA, RU) and comprises at least three corporate layers, both of which are structural indicators warranting enhanced due diligence under AMLA CDD thresholds. Material gaps include the inability to query OpenAleph due to a server error, and the fact that OpenSanctions data is licensed CC-BY-NC-4.0, precluding commercial re-use.
